resources.string:
⚠️ IMPORTANT SAFETY WARNING

MycoVision is a decision-support tool ONLY.

• Never consume a wild mushroom based solely on this application's output.
• AI classification can be wrong, especially with poor image quality, unusual lighting, or rare species.
• Always consult a qualified mycologist or expert before eating any wild mushroom.

🏥 IF YOU SUSPECT POISONING

Call emergency services immediately. Bring a sample or photo of the mushroom to the hospital. Symptoms may appear hours after ingestion.

🔒 PRIVACY

All photos and scan results are stored only on your device. MycoVision never uploads your data to external servers.

📸 FOR BEST RESULTS

• Photograph the cap, gills, stem, and base.
• Use natural daylight.
• Keep the mushroom in sharp focus.
• Do not apply filters or crop before scanning.
